message:
fix(demo-showcase): resolve SCREEN_INIT_EVENTS race condition in tests

Changed from global atomic counter to thread-local storage for screen
init event recording. This fixes flaky test failures where other tests
running concurrently would pollute the event list.

- Use thread_local! for SCREEN_INIT_EVENTS and SCREEN_INIT_RECORDING_ACTIVE
- Add ScreenInitEventGuard for scoped recording with test serialization
- Global mutex still serializes lazy-screen tests to prevent same-thread races
- Other tests' screen init events no longer affect guarded tests

All 960 demo-showcase tests and 1606 workspace lib tests now pass consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
